resources.string: Tired of getting caught in the rain without an umbrella? ☔ This app checks whether it is raining based on the latitude and longitude you enter. Enter coordinates to see where it might be raining.
Fields are empty. Please enter latitude and longitude.
Invalid numbers. Please enter valid coordinates.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Here is your answer. Select the back arrow above to return and enter more coordinates.
Coordinates are out of bounds. Latitude must be -90 to 90 and longitude must be -180 to 180.
